body_assessment: System healthy with ample RAM and low CPU load.

Access to GPT‑4o for self‑modification verification and strategic planning.
Switch to persistent server mode, giving faster semantic memory for >1000 records.

growth_philosophy: Add capabilities incrementally, only after they are proven safe, to keep the core system stable while expanding reasoning power.
